name: Steve Gorn
abstract: Steve Gorn (born 1944) in New York City) is a bansuri (bamboo flute)  and saxophone player. Gorn has performed Indian classical music, jazz and new American music on the bansuri bamboo flute and soprano saxophone in concerts and festivals throughout the world.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: Then we did Oneness... So we recorded an album called Oneness... Actually the Oneness group, we actually toured Europe... Steve Gorn! He played the flutes... we did Dancing With Nature Spirits and some co-written things by Mike Cain and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
